subject: Re: track motion shifts
body:
Hi Ottilie,

for individual micrographs, ticking the 'show motion tracks' checkbox in 
the realspace tab will show them. For the entire data set, the 'average 
motion per frame' plot in the overview tab will tell you the average value 
for the first 1/3 of each movie, which is usually the most relevant part 
for high-resolution work. Were you thinking of functionality beyond that?

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Wednesday, December 12, 2018 at 2:56:32 PM UTC+1, 
oloeffelholz@googlemail.com wrote:
>
> Hi,
> Is there a way to see the motion per frame in Warp somewhere? Could this 
> be added to the visualization?
> Ottilie
>
